summary: Iteration 14 — Validated the NEW tap-to-toggle frequency feature in Dashboard.jsx (selectFrequency L208-229) and ran a sanity sweep over auth/subscription/admin flows since AuthContext+SubscriptionContext were memoized. All 12 review-request scenarios pass. Toggle behavior verified via play-pause icon state (lucide-pause vs lucide-play) and timer-display reset: (1) Tap 432Hz -> PAUSE icon, freq=432.0Hz; tap same -> PLAY icon, timer=10:00 (default); tap third -> PAUSE (resume). (2) Tap 432 then 528 -> stays PAUSE, freq retunes to 528 (no stop). (3) Brainwave 7.83Hz toggle: tap=PAUSE/7.8Hz; tap=PLAY/timer=10:00. (4) Golden Stack: tap=PAUSE/144Hz; tap=PLAY; restart + tap Solfeggio 528 -> PAUSE/528Hz (clean cross-mode retune via sameMode guard). Regression: center play/pause unchanged. Auth: admin@example.com/admin123 login OK; fresh registration (test_iter14_*@example.com) returns 200 + pro=false. /api/me/subscription: admin={plan:admin, pro:true, is_admin:true}; fresh={plan:basic, pro:false, is_admin:false}. /api/plan/config public returns {monthly:9.99/30d, annual:60/365d, trial:7d}. Free-user gating: pro-preview-banner rendered, Brainwave & Specials section dimmed with lock overlay, clicking 7.83 as free user does NOT change current-frequency (stays 432Hz, no audio start). Saved sessions CRUD as admin: create=200, list=200(count=2), delete=200. Sleep Mode: starts (PAUSE/4Hz/30:00 timer), stops cleanly via center button. Cleanup: test user deleted via /api/admin/users/{id}. Pytest: 44 passed / 1 skipped / 2 pre-existing failures (not a new regression).

minor.issue: Pre-existing: test_subscription.py::test_checkout_monthly_creates_transaction and test_checkout_annual_creates_transaction fail because /me/transactions intentionally hides pending transactions (per test_billing_history.py contract). The two checkout tests are stale and need either to (a) mark the tx as paid before listing, or (b) be removed in favor of the billing_history tests.

action_items: (Low) Update or remove stale checkout-transaction tests in test_subscription.py (test_checkout_monthly_creates_transaction / test_checkout_annual_creates_transaction) — they assert pending tx appears in /me/transactions which is intentionally filtered. Either mark tx as paid before assertion, or delete in favor of test_billing_history.py coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx L208-229 selectFrequency tap-to-toggle: comparison uses live audioEngine.frequency (mutable instance prop) — correct and verified in DOM (current-frequency reflects engine.frequency). sameMode = wantGolden === !!audioEngine.goldenStack correctly distinguishes Golden Stack mode from non-Golden. Tolerance Math.abs(... - hz) < 0.05 handles float Hz like 7.83 safely. On stop, setRemaining(0) + setSleepMode(false) — but timer-display still shows the *default duration* (e.g. 10:00) rather than 00:00 because of how timer-display formats remaining<=0; this is a minor UX quirk but matches the spec ('timer returns to its default duration display').

AuthContext.js + SubscriptionContext.js memoization: useMemo on provider value + useCallback on stable handlers — no behavioral change observed. Login/logout/refresh-me unaffected; /api/me/subscription read on every reload still works (verified via fresh page load + getSubscription() in test).
audioEngine.js was NOT modified per instruction — its noop catches for iOS unlock + cleanup races remain intact.

Free user save-session-cap: a fresh user could POST /api/sessions once (status 200) — this is consistent with the basic-plan free-quota behavior (pytest test_subscription.py validates 402 happens after the cap, and test_admin_delete_users.py::test_sessions_402_gating_for_non_pro passes). No regression.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / admin123 (matches /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Fresh test user registered per-run: test_iter14_<ts>@example.com / Testpass123! (deleted at end via /api/admin/users/{id}).
seed_data_creation: Registered + deleted one fresh non-Pro user during the run. Created + deleted one TEST_session_iter14 saved session under admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The new tap-to-toggle uses live audioEngine.frequency comparison (not React state). When validating, rely on the play-pause-button HTML for icon state ('lucide-pause' vs 'lucide-play') and timer-display ('10:00' default = stopped, otherwise counting). Free-user Pro-section gating uses an absolute-positioned overlay CTA on top of an opacity-45 pointer-events-none grid — direct clicks on inner Pro buttons are no-ops (verified: freq stays unchanged), but clicking the section's overlay CTA opens AccountDashboard. The 2 failing pytest tests in test_subscription.py are pre-existing and orthogonal to this iteration's changes.
